carrier.description: the ocean carrier issuing the waybill (e.g. 'Ocean Network Express')

seaWaybillNumber.description: the sea waybill / bill of lading number (e.g. 'ONEYHKGCJ3680701')

shipperAddress.description: the shipper address lines joined with commas

consigneeAddress.description: the consignee address lines joined with commas

vesselVoyage.description: the ocean vessel name and voyage number (e.g. 'COSCO SPAIN 055E')

cartonsTotal.description: total number of cartons in the container (e.g. 241)

grossWeightKg.description: container total gross weight in kilograms (e.g. 2539.000)

grossMeasurementCbm.description: container total gross measurement in cubic meters (e.g. 22.520)

freightTerms.description: the freight payment terms as printed (e.g. 'OCEAN FREIGHT COLLECT')

placeOfIssue.description: the place where the bill was issued (e.g. 'SHENZHEN')

dateLadenOnBoard.description: the date cargo was laden on board in YYYY-MM-DD

dateIssued.description: the bill issue date in YYYY-MM-DD

cargoItems.description: one entry per per-style cargo line in the description of goods

goodsDescription.description: the fabric composition and garment description (e.g. "LADIES' 90% COTTON 10% SPANDEX KNITTED DRESS")

hsCode.description: the HS / commodity code for the item if printed (e.g. '620349')

cartons.description: number of cartons for this style (e.g. 92)

measurementCbm.description: measurement in cubic meters for this style (e.g. 8.01)

weightKg.description: gross weight in kilograms for this style (e.g. 1008)
